allOf.description: A JeopardyAlert represents a predicted exception during a process that may cause a risk to complete successfully the process.

alertDate.description: A date time( DateTime). The date that the alert issued

name.description: A string used to give a name to the jeopardy alert

jeopardyType.description: A string represents the type of jeopardy/risk like Normal, Hazard, Critical, ...

exception.description: The exception associated with this jeopardy alert

message.description: A string represents the message of the alert
